testcase.name: test_unauthenticated_cannot_access_admin_users
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_admin_features.py:492: in test_unauthenticated_cannot_access_admin_users assert resp.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
